name: storage hold of the mother ship
description: I'm in a storage hold of the mother ship
hints: This is the treasure room! Drop all treasures here and SAY SCORE.
You need to bring all 5 treasures here to win.
Treasures: Flask, Diamond, Belt, Painting, Sculpture.
DROP each treasure here then SAY SCOR to check your progress.
notes: Mother ship storage hold. THE treasure room. Drop all 5 treasures here and SCORE.
